query:
ALTER TABLE ifoodConfig 
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS clientId,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS clientSecret,
DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS webhookConfigured;

ALTER TABLE ifoodConfig 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS accessToken TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS refreshToken TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS tokenExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS authorizationCodeVerifier VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userCode VARCHAR(50),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS userCodeExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS merchantName VARCHAR(255),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isConnected BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL;
